package rulefixtures

// scenario for unbuffered_channel_for_known_producer_count: unbuffered channels `make(chan T)` when the number of producers/messages is known at construction time
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule690NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario690Negative(records []Rule690NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
